{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = The Eighth Division
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eighth Division]] is located on a floating junk heap.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Sir, we need to deliver him directly to the Eighth Division.” ... “Fine. Let’s go. It’s the floating junk heap over there.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
